title: Tameable Wither DataPack
description: This Data Pack Lets You Tame Withers
body:
- **This DataPack Makes Withers Tameable.**
 
To Tame A Wither Throw Down An Wither Rose Next To The Wither.

To Ride The Wither Sneak And Look Straight Up Next To It, You Can Make The Wither Do It's Attacks By Right Clicking.

1. Movement: to make the wither move when tamed, right-click in the 1st slot and look where you want to go.

2. Shoot Wither Skulls: you can make the wither shoot it's wither skulls like it would normal do when it's fighting you, to shoot the skulls select the 2nd slot and right-click.

3. Destory Dash: so you know how the wither in minecraft bedrock edition the wither can destory blocks by dashing, so i put that in this datapack, to do the dash select the 3rd slot and right-click

4. Final: finally to get off the wither sneak and right-click and look straight down, if you get off the wither in the air the wither will slowly bring you down to the ground.

- Injoy This DataPack Everyone :)
> The ResourcePack Is Optional You Don't Need It, It's Just For To Make The Warped Fungus On A Stick Invisible.
